events.title: Singing Together: Weekly Mantra & Music Circle #55 Kirtan with Alexandra McRobert & Friends
events.description:
Singing Together: Weekly Mantra & Music Circle – Different Artists Every Week

Every Tuesday, we come together as a community to sing, connect, and open our soul's voices through the power of sound. Each week, a different musician or group shares their unique flavor of Kirtan, mantras, or medicine music. It’s not about performance — it’s about connection, presence, and a shared voice.

We invite you to join our warm community and experience the transformative power of music and connection.

Come as you are, sing with us, and feel the magic of community through sound.

circle #55 Kirtan with Alexandra McRobert

Alexandra guides Kirtan in a way that feels open and inclusive to all, weaving music, silence, and devotion into one collective offering.

Join Alexandra for an evening of heart-opening kirtan at Sayuri’s — a sacred space to rest, release, and reconnect through mantra and song.

Kirtan is a form of meditation through music: we chant mantras together in a call-and-response style, allowing the mind to soften and the heart to open. No experience is needed. You don’t need a “good voice.” Just come as you are.

This is a space for: •⁠ ⁠Letting go of stress and overthinking •⁠ ⁠Reconnecting with devotion and inner peace •⁠ ⁠⁠ Feeling held in community •⁠ ⁠⁠ Resting in sound, breath, and presence

Whether you’re new to kirtan or have been practicing for years, you are warmly welcome.

Come sing, listen, pray, breathe, and remember who you are beneath the noise of daily life.

All levels welcome.

 

Limited space available – reserve your spot now.

Tickets:

Early birds – IDR 150K

On the day – IDR 200K

Tickets are available online and at the door.

events.title: Movie Night: The Brand New Testament
events.description:
Hygge Movie Night at Sayuri

The Brand New Testament

French | Dark Comedy | Satire | Drama | Fantasy

 

Movie Night + Discussion

God, who lives in Brussels with his wife and daughter Ea, finds joy in tormenting humans. Unable to cope with the abuse any longer, Ea escapes and decides to come up with her own New Testament.

Release date - September 1, 2015 (Belgium)

Director Jaco Van Dormael

Running time - 1h 54m

Languages English, French, German

🗓️ Tuesday | June 11

🕗 7:00 PM

📍 Sayuri Healing Food, Ubud

Come early and get cozy

events.description:
Singing Together: Weekly Mantra & Music Circle – Different Artists Every Week

Every Tuesday, we come together as a community to sing, connect, and open our soul's voices through the power of sound. Each week, a different musician or group shares their unique flavor of Kirtan, mantras, or medicine music. It’s not about performance — it’s about connection, presence, and a shared voice.

We invite you to join our warm community and experience the transformative power of music and connection.

Come as you are, sing with us, and feel the magic of community through sound.

circle #51

Heart-Opening Kirtan & Cacao with Prema Love

Tuesday | 6–7:30 PM

Tickets are available online and at the door

Early Bird IDR 150K

On the day IDR 200K

An evening of mystical mantra, soulful sound, and sacred connection.

Join us in a heart-centered journey of devotion with internationally touring voice alchemist and multi-instrumentalist Prema Love. With roots in Maui and the bhakti path, Prema weaves healing vibrations and divine feminine energy through her music — having performed for spiritual luminaries such as Ram Dass, Amma, and India’s Divine Mother Saints.

Let your voice and spirit soar in this intimate gathering of sacred music and community.

✨ All are welcome — cacao included.

events.title: Love is the answer : A soul evening of live original music
events.description:
Love Is the Answer is an intimate concert experience exploring the universal language of love through original compositions and live improvisation. This special evening brings together a unique ensemble of musicians led by pianist, singer, and composer Alina Gamerova.

Alina's music combines neoclassical piano, soulful vocals, and world music influences, creating a sound that is both deeply personal and universally resonant. Her compositions move between moments of stillness and intensity, inviting listeners into a space of presence, beauty, and emotional depth.

For this concert, Alina is joined by Rio (violin), Basouki Uki (guitar and bamboo flute), Petuk Lanang (percussion), and Jim Beckwith (vocals). Together they create a rich and dynamic soundscape where diverse musical traditions meet in harmony.

Throughout the evening, music becomes a bridge between cultures, emotions, and shared human experience. Whether gentle and meditative or uplifting and celebratory, each piece offers an invitation to listen deeply and connect with the essence of love beyond words.

Join us for an unforgettable evening of music, presence, and connection, and experience the transformative power of sound. Let yourself be inspired, uplifted, and carried by the universal language of music.

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Alina Gamerova is a pianist, singer, and composer whose music blends neoclassical, soulful, and world music influences. She began composing at the age of six and later studied vocal performance at Kazan State University of Culture and Art. With seven albums and numerous singles released in English, Indonesian, and Russian, her work reflects a lifelong passion for creating music that inspires connection, beauty, and inner transformation. Since 2022, she has been performing throughout Bali, sharing original concerts that bring people together through the universal language of music

events.title: Women's Initiation Retreat into the Animate Goddess
events.description:
For 7 days, we gather in one of Bali's most untouched regions to immerse ourselves in the living traditions of the Goddess through ritual, prayer, song, sacred waters, temple pilgrimages, Balinese ceremonies, voice liberation, embodiment, and sisterhood.
Held at the beautiful Bumi Cinta, nestled amongst waterfalls, mountains, and ocean views, this retreat is an invitation to step away from the noise of everyday life and into a deeper relationship with yourself, the Earth, and the sacred. 
This is the weaving together of decades of devotion, study, prayer, and lived practice that Evy and I have each cultivated on our own paths. It is a labour of love and an offering from our hearts.
events.short_description: A 7-day Women's Initiation Retreat in North Bali to immerse in the living traditions of the Goddess through ritual, prayer, song, ceremonies, embodiment, and sisterhood.

events.title: Pangaea Festival
events.description: Pangaea Festival is back for its 8th edition, featuring 10 international DJs, transformational facilitators, visionary artists, performers, healers, creators, and beautiful souls. The festival includes 5 immersive stages, live music, performances, Cacao & Connection Ceremony, daytime pool party, high-vibe buffet, alcohol-free elixir bars, fire & LED shows, transformational workshops, 2 sacred tea zones, live art, face painting, artisan vendors, human design readings, and a full sound healing dome line-up.
events.short_description: Pangaea Festival returns with 10 international DJs, transformational workshops, live music, ceremonies, and more. Featuring 5 stages, a pool party, and a sound healing dome.

events.title: Foundations of Flight
events.description:
Transitioning into the air is more than "muscling through" it’s a calculated balance of physics and focus. Foundations of Flight deconstructs arm balances into four essential pillars: wrist mobility, core integration, shoulder stability, and the art of the counterweight. On this workshop, we learn to use your fingertips as brakes and your core to create lightness. Whether you’re aiming for Crow Pose or a Handstand, you’ll gain the structural integrity needed to defy gravity with grace.

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Made Murni, 500h Registered Yoga Teacher shifted from completely rejecting yoga at first to 14 years of constant and intense yoga practice.

Made Murni shares her personal yoga journey, her fears, spiritual beliefs and wisdom as a Yoga Teacher to beginners and advanced practitioners alike.

Murni has been working at Yoga Barn since its inception in 2007 and for the past 8 years, she’s been teaching daily classes and running international workshops as a lead yoga teacher on various Yoga Teacher Training (YTT) faculties.

events.title: Dance Refuge
events.description:
In a time of rapid change and deep feeling, our bodies are being asked to process more than ever.

We begin by gently opening the body through yoga, creating space to listen inward. From there, we move into ecstatic dance… awakening expression, releasing what is held, and reconnecting to the pulse of life. We close with Yin Yoga, softening into stillness to integrate and restore.

All are welcome. Come as you are.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Sophie Sofree is a sonic weaver known for her ability to craft dance journeys that awaken the primal and the sacred. Her offerings weave together ecstatic dance, sacred bass, ceremony, and the raw truth of emotional alchemy. Having walked through the fire of deep personal grief, Sophie brings a rare tenderness and depth to her sets—creating containers where rage, sorrow, joy, and stillness are all welcome. Grief lives in her bones, not as heaviness, but as a compass—guiding her into ever deeper truth, compassion, and presence.

Each of her musical journeys is a ritual: a layered unfolding of tribal rhythms, medicine music, ancestral echoes, soul-stirring bass, and spacious integration. Her presence invites dancers to release, remember, and return—to the wisdom of their bodies, the voice of their hearts, and the quiet resilience of the human spirit.

She believes that grief is not something to get over—but something to dance with, to breathe with, and ultimately… to love.

events.title: Inversion Immersion: Diving Deep into Handstand Mastery
events.description:
Are you looking for a unique and fulfilling experience that connects you to yourself and the environment? Consider learning how to do a handstand. Inverting your body allows you to feel subtle vibrations and energy currents that exist within you and the world around you. Handstands offer a pathway to the sublime and foster awareness, inner peace, and personal growth.

But learning to do a handstand can be challenging. It requires letting go of preconceptions, developing trust, and utilizing inner fortitude and bravery. That's where our workshop comes in. We will teach you safe techniques to perform a handstand and which muscles to activate, as well as tips and tricks to enhance your practice. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned practitioner, our workshop will equip you with the knowledge and skills to master the handstand and reach new heights of self-discovery.

Join us and tap into your full potential through the transformative power of the handstand taught by Ni Made Murni – ERYT 500.
